mapper.select: SELECT s.idx AS pageId, s.name AS pageName, s.detail_name AS pageUrl, s.type AS gradeNo, s.status AS useYn, s.seq AS sortOrder FROM pi_setting s WHERE s.status = 'Y' ORDER BY s.seq ASC, s.idx ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_setting WHERE idx = #{pageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_setting SET name = #{pageName}, detail_name = #{pageUrl}, type = #{gradeNo}, status = #{useYn}, seq = #{sortOrder} WHERE idx = #{pageId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.AGENT_NAME AS nodeId, a.AGENT_NAME AS nodeName, a.AP_NO AS port, a.AGENT_VERSION AS agentVersion, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS ipAddress, CASE WHEN a.agent_connected = 1 THEN 'CONNECTED' ELSE 'DISCONNECTED' END AS status, a.AGENT_USE AS useYn, a.AGENT_PLATFORM AS platform, a.REGDATE AS regDate, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_START_DT AS connectedStartDt FROM pi_agents a ORDER BY a.AGENT_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_agents ( AGENT_NAME, AP_NO, AGENT_VERSION, AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, AGENT_USE, AGENT_PLATFORM, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{agentName}, #{apNo}, #{agentVersion}, #{connectedIp}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{platform}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AGENT_VERSION = IFNULL(#{agentVersion}, AGENT_VERSION), AGENT_CONNECTED_IP = IFNULL(#{connectedIp}, AGENT_CONNECTED_IP), AGENT_USE = IFNULL(#{useYn}, AGENT_USE), AGENT_PLATFORM = IFNULL(#{platform}, AGENT_PLATFORM)
mapper.select: SELECT s.idx AS interlockId, s.name AS interlockName, s.detail_name AS interlockUrl, s.status AS status, s.type AS interlockType, s.seq AS sortOrder FROM pi_setting s WHERE s.type = 2 ORDER BY s.seq ASC, s.idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_setting ( idx, name, detail_name, type, status, seq ) VALUES ( (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(t.idx), 0) + 1 FROM pi_setting t), #{settingName}, #{settingValue}, 2, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(t2.seq), 0) + 1 FROM pi_setting t2 WHERE t2.type = 2)) )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_setting SET name = #{settingName}, detail_name = #{settingValue}, status = IFNULL(#{useYn}, status), seq = IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, seq) WHERE idx = #{interlockId} AND type = 2
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pi_setting WHERE idx = #{interlockId} AND type = 2
